channel.title: Legal Research Blog
channel.description: Indian Supreme Court and High Court judgment analyses, case summaries, and legal research on constitutional law, criminal law, human rights, and landmark Indian legal precedents.

item.title: A D.K. BASU v. STATE OF WEST BENGAL DECEMBER
item.description: Full case analysis of A D.K. BASU v. STATE OF WEST BENGAL DECEMBER

item.title: S.C.R. PARAMVIR SINGH SAINI v. BALJIT SINGH & ORS
item.description: Full case analysis of S.C.R. PARAMVIR SINGH SAINI v. BALJIT SINGH & ORS

item.title: What impact did D.K. Basu v. State of West Bengal 1996 have on Indian policing?
D.K. Basu v. State of West Bengal: Impact on Indian Policing
item.description: A comprehensive analysis of the 1996 D.K. Basu judgment's impact on custodial violence guidelines and Indian policing practices.

item.title: A D.K. BASU v. STATE OF WEST BENGAL DECEMBER (मराठी अनुवाद)
item.description: Legal analysis of A D.K. BASU v. STATE OF WEST BENGAL DECEMBER (मराठी अनुवाद)
